data.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: In plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml, the tests-pipefail-strict job sets BASH_OPTS: '-eo pipefail' as an env variable. GitHub Actions does not automatically apply BASH_OPTS to shell steps — the variable must be explicitly consumed (e.g., via bash $BASH_OPTS script.sh in the run: step). SUITE_TEST_INDEX is also set as env but not referenced in any step. Both may be documentation intent rather than enforced behavior.
File: plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml
Category: maintainability
Mitigation: Verify whether the DSO_TEST_CMD GitHub variable is expected to use $BASH_OPTS. If so, document this in the template comment. If not, restructure the job to apply flags directly in the run: step.
data.title: [ci-dso-staged]: BASH_OPTS env var not automatically applied by GitHub Actions bash shell steps
